2026-03-01.note:
ஹரிஷ்: Dear students, 
MONDAY POM Cycle test 2 

Kindly prepare well for the PoM Cycle test 2 on Monday 2.3.26

ஹரிஷ்: Part-B                                                                                                                          1.Explain the different types of departmentation. 						
2.List and explain the span of control and delegation of authority. 		  
3.Analyze the Human Resource Management activities in a business organization.
4.List and explain the nature and purpose of organization.

2026-03-09.author: RMD
2026-03-09.note:
[7:22 AM, 9/3/2026] Jagan Babu Sir, Students 
Today is the only day to learn DSP IA2 exam.
Concentration more on unit 4 problems thoroughly and then unit 3 . 
Practise many times in calculator and get correct answer. 
Focus on 2marks . 
Don't waste the time.
[7:27 AM, 9/3/2026] Jagan Babu Sir: Dear parents 
 Internal Assessment 2 

 Date : 10.03.26 
Day : Tuesday 
Timings : 12.00 to 3.00pm
Marks : 100
Syllabus : Unit 3 & 4

Kindly encourage your wards to prepare well for coming week. Focus more on all topics and possible questions, practice many times. Inform your wards to score 90 above in all subjects. 
Hard work never fails. 
 Attendance mandatory
